Class Exorcist

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable, SpawnAttack, UsesAmmo
public class Exorcist extends HybridClass implements SpawnAttack, UsesAmmo
Exorcist hybrid character using projectile bullets with ammo and reload mechanics.

    Returns max ammo capacity.

    Optional initializer for weapon sprite defaults.
    boolean

    Exorcist projectile attacks are treated as instant-complete.
    boolean
    isReloading()
    Returns reload state.
    void
    reload()
    Starts reload when magazine is not full.
    void
    setupAttackFrame(int totalFrame)
    Not used for Exorcist projectile attacks.
    void
    startAttack(Player self)
    Exorcist does not use frame-based start animation here.
    void
    updateAmmo()
    Completes reload when duration has elapsed and hides temporary weapon sprite.
    void
    updateAttack(Player self)
    Immediately returns player to walk state.

      Parameters:
      hp - HP value
      atk - attack value
      def - defense value
      attackRange - range value
      attackSpeed - attack speed

      Creates Exorcist with default hybrid stats.

      Optional initializer for weapon sprite defaults.

    • attack

      public void attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
      Fires a bullet projectile if shooting constraints pass.
      Overrides:
      attack in class HybridClass
      Parameters:
      startX - spawn X
      startY - spawn Y
      facingRight - facing direction
      p - owning player

    • canShoot

      public boolean canShoot()
      Checks whether Exorcist can shoot now.
      Specified by:
      canShoot in interface UsesAmmo
      Returns:
      true if not reloading, has ammo, and shoot delay elapsed

    • consumeAmmo

      public void consumeAmmo()
      Consumes one ammo and updates shot timestamp.
      Specified by:
      consumeAmmo in interface UsesAmmo

      public void reload()
      Starts reload when magazine is not full.
      Specified by:
      reload in interface UsesAmmo

    • updateAmmo

      public void updateAmmo()
      Completes reload when duration has elapsed and hides temporary weapon sprite.
      Specified by:
      updateAmmo in interface UsesAmmo

    • startAttack

      public void startAttack(Player self)
      Exorcist does not use frame-based start animation here.
      Specified by:

      Overrides:
      startAttack in class HybridClass
      Parameters:
      self - owning player

      Immediately returns player to walk state.

      updateAttack in class HybridClass
      Parameters:
      self - owning player

      public void setupAttackFrame(int totalFrame)

      Parameters:

    • isAttackFinished

      public boolean isAttackFinished()
      Exorcist projectile attacks are treated as instant-complete.
      Specified by:
      isAttackFinished in interface AttackAnimation
      Overrides:
      isAttackFinished in class HybridClass
      Returns:
      always true
